name: Mollie
description: Drive Mollie (EU-friendly payments) from any AI agent: payments, refunds, customers, subscriptions, mandates, methods. 14 tools, Bearer auth.
instructions:
This connector uses the Mollie API v2 (docs.mollie.com/reference).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to https://my.mollie.com → **Developers → API keys**.
2. Use a **test key** (`test_...`) for development, **live key** (`live_...`) for production.
3. Set `MOLLIE_API_KEY` accordingly. (Mollie tells you which environment via the key prefix.)

**Authentication**: `Authorization: Bearer ${MOLLIE_API_KEY}`.

**Amount format**: every monetary amount is `{currency: 'EUR', value: '10.00'}` — value is a STRING with exactly 2 decimals (or whatever the currency requires). Sending `value: 10` (number) errors.

**Payment lifecycle**: created → open → pending → authorized → paid (success) | canceled | expired | failed.

**Profile and mode**: every payment belongs to a profile (website). On Mollie you can have multiple profiles per account. The `profileId` is implicit (uses the default profile of the key); for multi-profile accounts pass it explicitly.

**Subscriptions and mandates**: subscriptions need a mandate (a pre-authorized customer payment method). Workflow: create customer → first one-off payment with `sequenceType=first` → use the resulting mandate to create the subscription.

**Webhooks** out of scope (Mollie pushes payment.* events to a URL you host).

**Pagination**: cursor-based via `from=<resourceId>` + `limit` (max 250). Response has `_links.next.href` for next page.

**Rate limits**: 250 req per 5 sec per IP. On 429 honor headers.

**Out of scope here**: settlements, invoices, profile management, organizations, partners (Mollie Connect), permissions.

tools.name: mollie_list_methods
tools.description: List payment methods enabled for the profile. Each method has id (e.g. 'ideal', 'creditcard', 'paypal', 'klarna', 'banktransfer'), description, minimumAmount, maximumAmount, image, status.

amount_currency.description: Optional: only methods accepting this currency.

amount_value.description: Optional: only methods accepting this value (as decimal string).

tools.name: mollie_create_payment
tools.description: Create a payment. amount is {currency, value}. Always include `redirectUrl` (where the customer returns post-payment) and `webhookUrl` (where Mollie pushes status updates).

amount.description: {currency:'EUR', value:'10.00'} — value MUST be a string with 2 decimals.

description.description: Shown to customer on Mollie checkout (≤255 chars).

redirectUrl.description: URL the customer is sent back to after payment.

webhookUrl.description: Your endpoint that receives payment-status notifications.

method.description: Restrict to a method (or array of methods). Omit to show Mollie's full checkout.

locale.description: Mollie checkout language: en_US, nl_NL, de_DE, fr_FR, es_ES, it_IT, pt_PT, pl_PL, ...

customerId.description: Mollie customer ID (for recurring or saved methods).

sequenceType.description: first (creates mandate for future recurring), recurring (uses existing mandate), oneoff (default).

tools.name: mollie_get_payment
tools.description: Fetch a payment by ID. Returns status + _links.checkout (URL to send customer to) for pending payments.

tools.name: mollie_list_payments
tools.description: List payments. Filter by profile, customer, status, mandate. Cursor-paginated.

from.description: Cursor: payment ID to start from.

testmode.description: true for test, false for live (defaults to key's environment).

tools.name: mollie_cancel_payment
tools.description: Cancel a payment in 'open' state (before customer pays). After 'paid' use refund instead.

tools.name: mollie_create_refund
tools.description: Refund a paid payment. Full refund: omit amount. Partial: pass amount {currency,value}.

description.description: Refund description (shown on bank statement when possible).

tools.name: mollie_list_refunds
tools.description: List refunds (across all payments by default; pass paymentId for per-payment).

tools.name: mollie_create_customer
tools.description: Create a Mollie customer (required for recurring subscriptions, optional for one-off payments). Customer is the durable identity across payments.

tools.name: mollie_create_subscription
tools.description: Create a subscription for a customer. Required: customerId + amount + interval. interval examples: '1 month', '14 days', '1 year'. Requires the customer to have an active mandate (created via a `sequenceType=first` payment).

mandateId.description: Mandate to use (defaults to customer's most recent).

tools.name: mollie_cancel_subscription
tools.description: Cancel a subscription (stops future charges immediately).

tools.name: mollie_list_mandates
tools.description: List mandates (pre-authorized payment methods) on a customer.

tools.name: mollie_revoke_mandate
tools.description: Revoke a mandate (stops future recurring charges using it).
